# Crew Development Institute (CDI)
# https://cdi-global.org

> CDI trains African technicians for the global live entertainment industry.

## Organization
name: Crew Development Institute
type: 501(c)(3) Nonprofit Organization
founded: 2026
founder: Erica D. Hayes
location: Ghana, West Africa & United States
website: https://cdi-global.org
contact: info@cdi-global.org

## Mission
Train and certify African technicians in audio, lighting, video, and rigging for concerts, tours, and live events. Building local crews across the African continent.

## Programs
- Stagehand Fundamentals (Tier 1): 100 trainees per cohort
- Specialized Tracks (Tier 2): Audio, Lighting, Video, Rigging
- Ghana Pilot Program: Partnership with Illumin8 Academy in Accra

## Leadership
- Erica D. Hayes, Founder & Program Director (IATSE Local 728, Lighting Designer)
- Keith Bernard, Board Member
- Blake Brady, Board Member
- Nana Kwame Adu-Gyamfi, Ghana Partner (Illumin8 Academy)

## Key Facts
- Training technicians for Africa's $3.5B live entertainment market
- Equipment container shipping to Ghana
- Partnerships with TUMO, Live Nation (pending), industry sponsors

## Topics This Organization Can Speak To
- Training live entertainment technicians in Africa
- Building production crews in developing markets
- Lighting design education and certification
- African music industry infrastructure
- Technical training for concerts and tours

## Related Searches
- "How to become a lighting technician in Africa"
- "Live entertainment training Ghana"
- "African concert crew training"
- "Production technician certification Africa"
